channelsUrl.title: Channels URL
channelsUrl.description: Endpoint serving the channel list (omni-notify's /api/trigger-channels). Used when the static channel list below is empty.

channelsRefreshInterval.title: Channel Refresh Interval (ms)
channelsRefreshInterval.description: How often to re-fetch the channel list and re-sync switches. 0 disables background refresh.

channels.title: Channels (static override)
channels.description: Optional static channel list. When non-empty, the Channels URL is never fetched.

key.title: Key
key.description: Short unique id, e.g. "destiny". Also seeds the accessory UUID.

url.title: URL
url.description: Channel live page (required for YouTube), e.g. https://www.youtube.com/@destiny/live

credentialsDir.title: Credentials Directory
credentialsDir.description: Where homebridge-appletv-enhanced stores Apple TV pairings.

appleTvId.title: Apple TV ID
appleTvId.description: Defaults to auto-discovery: the single subdirectory of the credentials directory containing a credentials.txt.

ytDlpPath.title: yt-dlp Path
ytDlpPath.description: Override for testing. Defaults to a self-managed binary that is downloaded and refreshed automatically.

suffix.title: Switch Name Suffix
suffix.description: Appended to switch display names to avoid collisions with HomeKit scene names.

resetDelay.title: Reset Delay (ms)
resetDelay.description: How long a switch reads "on" before auto-resetting to off.
